channel.title: NaturalMed — TCM Articles
channel.description: Monthly articles on Traditional Chinese Medicine — acupuncture, herbal medicine and holistic wellbeing — by Nuno Pestana, BSc TCM, Member ATCM UK.

item.title: Migraines and Chinese Medicine — Beyond the Painkiller
item.dc:creator: Nuno Pestana
item.description: A migraine is not simply a bad headache. It is a debilitating neurological event that can last for hours or days, disrupting work, relationships, and quality of life. Conventional medicine offers relief — but for many people, the attacks keep coming.
item.content:encoded:
A migraine is not simply a bad headache. It is a debilitating neurological event that can last for hours or days, disrupting work, relationships, and quality of life. Conventional medicine offers relief — but for many people, the attacks keep coming.

Read the full article →

item.title: Neck Pain: What Traditional Chinese Medicine Can Do For You
item.dc:creator: Nuno Pestana
item.description: Neck pain is one of the most common complaints in modern life — and one of the conditions Traditional Chinese Medicine treats most effectively.
item.content:encoded:
Neck pain is one of the most common complaints in modern life — and one of the conditions Traditional Chinese Medicine treats most effectively.

Read the full article →

item.title: Insomnia and Chinese Medicine — Why Your Mind Won't Switch Off
item.dc:creator: Nuno Pestana
item.description: You are exhausted, yet the moment your head touches the pillow your thoughts begin racing. You toss and turn, check the clock, and watch the hours slip away. Sound familiar?
item.content:encoded:
You are exhausted, yet the moment your head touches the pillow your thoughts begin racing. You toss and turn, check the clock, and watch the hours slip away. Sound familiar?

Read the full article →

item.title: Acupuncture and Chronic Pain: A TCM Perspective
item.dc:creator: Nuno Pestana
item.description: Chronic pain affects millions of people worldwide, yet conventional medicine often struggles to offer lasting relief. Traditional Chinese Medicine offers a fundamentally different approach — one that treats the root cause, not just the symptom.
item.content:encoded:
Chronic pain affects millions of people worldwide, yet conventional medicine often struggles to offer lasting relief. Traditional Chinese Medicine offers a fundamentally different approach — one that treats the root cause, not just the symptom.

Read the full article →
